notes: Initial v1.0 weights. Demo:Geo:Comp = 50:30:20. Calibrated against peer-reviewed elasticity estimates of medical loss to demographic, geographic, and structural factors. Subject to annual re-fit per §5.2. | v3.2: pool-centric, AI residual trained on block, multiplicative composite, captive-aware composition (no size/concentration loads). | v3.3: Geographic loading reduced alpha 0.07 -> 0.04 and clamped to [0.92, 1.08]. Prevents geographic from dominating the score (was contributing 13% on rural-Southern groups; now max ±8%). | v3.4: tightened thresholds to target 20% Preferred / 60% Standard / 20% Decline. | v3.5: Thresholds re-calibrated to 0.72 / 1.36 from the EMPIRICAL p20/p80 of 79 real groups (8,813 lives) parsed from Employee Navigator XML. Achieves the target 20/60/20 distribution on the actual block.
